methods.name: BitmapFromIconResource(String, Assembly)
methods.signature: public static Bitmap BitmapFromIconResource(string resourceName, Assembly assembly = null)
methods.summary: Load a Icon from an embedded resource and convert it to a bitmap of the specified size. Will look for a icon image that is greater than or equal to the requested size, if all images are less than the requested size the largest image will be used.

params.name: resourceName
params.doc: [Missing <param name="resourceName"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.UI.DrawingUtilities.BitmapFromIconResource(System.String,System.Reflection.Assembly)"]

params.name: assembly
params.doc: The assembly containing the manifest resource, will use the calling assembly if null.

methods.name: BitmapFromIconResource(String, Size, Assembly)
methods.signature: public static Bitmap BitmapFromIconResource(string resourceName, Size bitmapSize, Assembly assembly = null)
methods.summary: Load a Icon from an embedded resource and convert it to a bitmap of the specified size. Will look for a icon image that is greater than or equal to the requested size, if all images are less than the requested size the largest image will be used.

params.name: resourceName
params.doc: [Missing <param name="resourceName"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.UI.DrawingUtilities.BitmapFromIconResource(System.String,System.Drawing.Size,System.Reflection.Assembly)"]

params.name: bitmapSize
params.doc: Desired bitmap size

params.name: assembly
params.doc: The assembly containing the manifest resource, will use the calling assembly if null.

methods.name: CreateMeshPreviewImage(Mesh, Color, Size)
methods.signature: public static Bitmap CreateMeshPreviewImage(Mesh mesh, Color color, Size size)
methods.summary: Creates a preview image of a mesh.

params.name: mesh
params.doc: The mesh.

params.name: color
params.doc: The draw color.

params.name: size
params.doc: The size of the preview image.

returns.doc: A bitmap if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: CreateMeshPreviewImage(IEnumerable<Mesh>, IEnumerable<Color>, Size)
methods.signature: public static Bitmap CreateMeshPreviewImage(IEnumerable<Mesh> meshes, IEnumerable<Color> colors, Size size)
methods.summary: Creates a preview image of one or more meshes.

params.name: meshes
params.doc: The meshes.

params.name: colors
params.doc: The draw colors, one for each mesh.

params.name: size
params.doc: The size of the preview image.

returns.doc: A bitmap if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: CreateMeshPreviewImage(RhinoDoc, IEnumerable<Mesh>, IEnumerable<Color>, Size)
methods.signature: public static Bitmap CreateMeshPreviewImage(RhinoDoc doc, IEnumerable<Mesh> meshes, IEnumerable<Color> colors, Size size)
methods.summary: Creates a preview image of one or more meshes.

params.name: doc
params.doc: The active document.

params.name: meshes
params.doc: The meshes.

params.name: colors
params.doc: The draw colors, one for each mesh.

params.name: size
params.doc: The size of the preview image.

returns.doc: A bitmap if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: IconFromResource(String, Assembly)
methods.signature: public static Icon IconFromResource(string resourceName, Assembly assembly = null)
methods.summary: Load a Icon from an embedded resource.

params.name: resourceName
params.doc: The case-sensitive name of the icon manifest resource being requested.

params.name: assembly
params.doc: The assembly containing the manifest resource, will use the calling assembly if null.

returns.doc: The Icon resource if found and loaded otherwise null.

methods.name: IconFromResource(String, Size, Assembly)
methods.signature: public static Icon IconFromResource(string resourceName, Size size, Assembly assembly = null)
methods.summary: Load a Icon from an embedded resource.

params.name: resourceName
params.doc: The case-sensitive name of the icon manifest resource being requested.

params.name: size
params.doc: The desired size of the icon.

params.name: assembly
params.doc: The assembly containing the manifest resource, will use the calling assembly if null.

returns.doc: The Icon resource if found and loaded otherwise null.

methods.name: ImageFromResource
methods.signature: public static Image ImageFromResource(string resourceName, Assembly assembly = null)
methods.summary: Load a Image from an embedded resource.

params.name: resourceName
params.doc: The case-sensitive name of the image manifest resource being requested.

params.name: assembly
params.doc: The assembly containing the manifest resource, will use the calling assembly if null.

returns.doc: The Image resource if found and loaded otherwise null.

methods.name: LoadBitmapWithScaleDown
methods.signature: public static Bitmap LoadBitmapWithScaleDown(string iconName, int sizeDesired, Assembly assembly = null)
methods.summary: Loads an icon from an embedded resource and converts it to a bitmap. If the icon is not a standard size, this function scales down a larger image.

params.name: iconName
params.doc: The case-sensitive name of the icon manifest resource being requested.

params.name: sizeDesired
params.doc: The desired size, in pixels, of the icon.

params.name: assembly
params.doc: The assembly containing the manifest resource.

returns.doc: The icon converted to a bitmap if successful, null otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown when iconName is not found as an embedded resource in the specified assembly.

methods.name: LoadIconWithScaleDown
methods.signature: public static Icon LoadIconWithScaleDown(string iconName, int sizeDesired, Assembly assembly = null)
methods.summary: Loads an icon from an embedded resource. If the icon is not a standard size, this function scales down a larger image.

params.name: iconName
params.doc: The case-sensitive name of the icon manifest resource being requested.

params.name: sizeDesired
params.doc: The desired size, in pixels, of the icon.

params.name: assembly
params.doc: The assembly containing the manifest resource.

returns.doc: The icon if successful, null otherwise.

throws.when: Thrown when iconName is not found as an embedded resource in the specified assembly.
